---
title: "Clustering"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: united
    df_print: kable
  pdf_document: default
---


################ this section is disabled for now#

First set up Zorn/Bascet according to the [install instructions](install.html). This tutorial assumes that you have [debarcoded the reads](debarcoding.html).



[(SLURM-compatible step)](slurm.html)

```{r, eval=F, echo=T}




```
